title: Understanding Digital Product Stores with No-KYC Payments: A Plain-Language Breakdown — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, struggling to sell ebooks, courses, or software online because PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad won't accept your payments due to geographic restrictions or KYC requirements, you're not alone. Many creators face this challenge. In this post, we'll explore how to create a digital product store with no-KYC payments, so you can sell your digital creations without relying on these platforms.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

A no-KYC payment digital product store is an online platform that allows creators to sell digital goods without requiring buyers to create an account or undergo Know-Your-Customer (KYC) checks. This setup is essential for creators in countries with strict financial regulations or those who want to offer anonymous payment options to their customers. By using this type of store, creators can focus on selling their digital products without worrying about payment processing hurdles.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The technology behind a no-KYC payment digital product store relies on cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, or USDT, which can be integrated into your store using a frontend wallet like Web3 Wallet Connect. This wallet allows buyers to make payments using a multi-chain QR code, and the transaction is processed in real-time. The store's backend, such as the Core Shop Engine, handles automated delivery and payment verification, ensuring a seamless customer experience.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This type of store is perfect for digital creators who want to sell ebooks, courses, software, or other digital products without the need for a traditional payment processor. It's also ideal for creators in countries with restricted financial systems or those who prefer to offer anonymous payment options to their customers. By using a no-KYC payment digital product store, creators can focus on their content creation and sales, without worrying about payment processing complexities.
Automated delivery means the download link arrives before the buyer navigates away from the payment confirmation page.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Admin Dashboard gives you visibility into every aspect of your store's operation. Every transaction appears in the log with the buyer's email, the product purchased, the payment amount in crypto and USD equivalent, the transaction hash for on-chain verification, and the delivery status. You can see at a glance whether the download link was sent, whether the email was delivered, and whether there are any orders requiring attention. Real-time analytics show you which products are selling, where your buyers are located geographically, and what coins they are using for payment. This visibility is what separates a professional digital store from a manual operation — you always know exactly what your store is doing.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To set up a no-KYC payment digital product store, start by selecting a suitable frontend wallet like Web3 Wallet Connect. Next, choose a backend engine like the Core Shop Engine, which offers automated delivery and payment verification. Finally, integrate a payment processor like NOWPayments, which supports over 300 cryptocurrencies. By following these steps, you can create a digital product store that allows you to sell your creations without relying on traditional payment processors.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal? To sell an ebook online without PayPal, you can use a no-KYC payment digital product store like Unchained Commerce, which integrates with cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum. This setup allows buyers to make anonymous payments, bypassing the need for a traditional payment processor like PayPal.
Every digital file type — ebooks, fonts, presets, plugins, templates — works with the same delivery pipeline.

Your Action Checklist

To create a no-KYC payment digital product store, follow these steps: Select a suitable frontend wallet like Web3 Wallet Connect to integrate with your store. Choose a backend engine like the Core Shop Engine, which offers automated delivery and payment verification. Integrate a payment processor like NOWPayments, which supports over 300 cryptocurrencies. Set up a separate domain for your store and install the necessary plugins. Configure your store's settings, including payment options and delivery methods. Finally, test your store with a few sample products to ensure everything is working correctly.
No platform middleman means no percentage cut, no payout delay, and no content policy that can delist your products.
